name_en: 【Top Grade Hardware, Original Leather】IVY Canvas Tote/Shoulder Bag~White Canvas
name_cn:
【Top Grade Hardware, Original Leather】IVY Canvas Tote/Shoulder Bag~White Canvas
This IVY canvas tote exudes a unique urban style and summer vibe. It highlights its unique design features. The letter logo showcases the brand's classic identity.
~With handle
~Gold-plated hardware
~Front letter logo
~Lined with double-chain zip pocket
Size: W28×H28×D12cm
No.: 5BG286
